summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CSV import/export functionality for Romanian company CUI codes. All major features working correctly with minor backend message validation issue.

minor_issues.issue: API health check expects 'Portal JUST Downloader API' but returns 'Portal JUST Downloader API - PostgreSQL Edition'

passed_tests: POST /api/db/import-cui - CSV import with CUI data working
Frontend Import CUI section visible and functional
Badge shows correct X/Y CUI count (5/287 cu CUI)
Import CSV button present and accessible
Export Firme button clickable and triggers download
CUI matching functionality works for normalized company names
